---
title: 'Store'
date: '2014-03-13T06:34:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Texas Cows and Crafts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '8826191110503763009'
blogger_filename: '/p/store_2.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Texas Cows and Crafts/feed.atom'
---

<h3>
Etsy Store</h3>
<br />
Thank you for checking out my Texas Cows and Crafts website. If you like what you've seen you may see which items are available for purchase at our Etsy Store. To see out entire <a href="https://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Etsy Store: Click Here</a><br />
<br />
<script src="http://www.etsy.com/assets/js/etsy_mini_shop.js" type="text/javascript"></script><script type="text/javascript">new Etsy.Mini(6439720,'gallery',3,3,1,'http://www.etsy.com');</script>

<br />
<h3 style="text-align: center;">
</h3>
Thank You for visiting TC&amp;C!
Please contact me with any questions or special requests: <a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="https://www.goodsmiths.com/texas-cows-and-crafts" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/300x250-badge4-d3d7dca866bb.png" /></a></div>
<div style="text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">h</a><a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">ttp://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Cows-Crafts/298135563538323" target="_blank">Connect on Facebook</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://plus.google.com/b/118156879240088112738/118156879240088112738/posts" target="_blank">Connect on Google+</a><br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" src="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" style="border-style: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Past Events</h4>
<h4>
Did you see us there?</h4>
<br />
<style type="text/css">
<!--
iframe {
float:left;
margin:2px;
}
-->
</style>

<br />
<embed type="application/x-shockwave-flash" src="https://photos.gstatic.com/media/slideshow.swf" width="288" height="192" flashvars="host=picasaweb.google.com&hl=en_US&feat=flashalbum&RGB=0x000000&feed=https%3A%2F%2Fpicasaweb.google.com%2Fdata%2Ffeed%2Fapi%2Fuser%2F115276805483167457930%2Falbumid%2F5657542925243667073%3Falt%3Drss%26kind%3Dphoto%26hl%3Den_US" pluginspage="http://www.macromedia.com/go/getflashplayer"></embed>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Created with <a href="http://www.admarket.se/" title="Admarket.se">Admarket's</a> <a href="http://flickrslidr.com/" title="flickrSLiDR">flickrSLiDR</a>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
